top_findings.title: MCP server not executable as standalone tool
top_findings.evidence: main.go:89 calls server.ServeStdio(s) requiring stdin/stdout transport; no HTTP server or daemon mode available
top_findings.suggestion: The implementation follows MCP stdio transport correctly, but verify integration with actual LLM clients

top_findings.title: Data source integration incomplete
top_findings.evidence: main.go:21-28 defaults to relative 'data/kaggle' path; no support for configuring alternative data sources or optional APIs (API-Football, TheSportsDB)
top_findings.suggestion: Add environment variables or config file for external API integration
